title: Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple
tagline: Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Thrissur City of Kerala, India.
overview.description: Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Thrissur City of Kerala, India. The temple is a participant in the Thrissur Pooram every year. The presiding deity is goddess Durga as mahishasurmardhini. The goddess proceeds to Vadakkumnathan temple starting with one elephants and nadaswaram.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Muthuvara Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Muthuvara Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: മുതുവറ മഹാദേവക്ഷേത്രം) is a Shiv temple located in Muthuvara, Thrissur city of India. Parashurama, the sixth avatar of Vishnu has installed the idol.

topPlaces.name: Vilangan Hills
topPlaces.description: Vilangan Hills (Malayalam: വിലങ്ങൻ കുന്ന്) is a hillock located in Adat Panchayat, near Thrissur city of Kerala state in India. The hill gives a panoramic view of Thrissur city and Thrissur-Ponnani Kole Wetlands from the top.

topPlaces.name: Amala Nagar
topPlaces.description: Amala Nagar is an Indian village in the Thrissur district of Kerala. It has Amala Institute of Medical Sciences, one of medical colleges of Thrissur district (And after which the place itself is named).

topPlaces.name: Muthuvara
topPlaces.description: Muthuvara is a village in the Thrissur district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Sobha City Mall
topPlaces.description: Sobha City Mall is a shopping mall in Sobha City, Puzhakkal, Thrissur City, Kerala, India. The Mall opened on 17 December 2015.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Puranattukara
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Puranattukara is a Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan school in Thrissur City under the Ministry of Human Resource Development, Government of India. Situated at the valley of the "Vilangankunnu", this institution is a pride to the Cultural Capital of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Puranattukara
topPlaces.description: Puranattukara is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kuttur (Thrissur)
topPlaces.description: Kuttur, also known as Kuttoor, is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Kuttur is located 5–8 km from Thrissur town and is part of Kolazhy Grama Panchayat.

items.note: Muthuvara Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: മുതുവറ മഹാദേവക്ഷേത്രം) is a Shiv temple located in Muthuvara, Thrissur city of India. Parashurama, the sixth avatar of Vishnu has installed the idol.

Vilangan Hills (Malayalam: വിലങ്ങൻ കുന്ന്) is a hillock located in Adat Panchayat, near Thrissur city of Kerala state in India. The hill gives a panoramic view of Thrissur city and Thrissur-Ponnani Kole Wetlands from the top.

Amala Nagar is an Indian village in the Thrissur district of Kerala. It has Amala Institute of Medical Sciences, one of medical colleges of Thrissur district (And after which the place itself is named).
Muthuvara is a village in the Thrissur district of Kerala, India.
Sobha City Mall is a shopping mall in Sobha City, Puzhakkal, Thrissur City, Kerala, India. The Mall opened on 17 December 2015.

Kendriya Vidyalaya, Puranattukara is a Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan school in Thrissur City under the Ministry of Human Resource Development, Government of India. Situated at the valley of the "Vilangankunnu", this institution is a pride to the Cultural Capital of Kerala.
Puranattukara is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.
Kuttur, also known as Kuttoor, is a census town in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Kuttur is located 5–8 km from Thrissur town and is part of Kolazhy Grama Panchayat.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Choorakkottukavu Bhagavathy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Muthuvara Mahadeva Temple, Vilangan Hills, Amala Nagar, Muthuvara, Sobha City Mall.
